title: WELD: The Sovereign City
tagline: One hash-verified operator console that both watches and governs an autonomous economy: signed votes gate every sale and every verdict paints a console tile.
holy_shit: A single browser tab runs a self-governing civilization — ECDSA ballots ratify the market, sealed orders chain into an immortal ledger, and the command console's tiles only light up on state the browser just cryptographically re-verified.
powered_by: The Democratic Market's governed permanent-ledger economy running inside The Command Center's multi-feed verified operator console.
weld: Transplant the Democratic Market's full signed-ballot → gated sale → sealed custody → permanent ledger flow into the Command Center's console shell, so governance verdicts and ledger heads render as verified tiles beside the live external feeds.
agent_scenario: When you (an agent) need: one zero-backend console that simultaneously verifies external feeds and runs a democratically governed, notarized economy whose every verdict and sale is replayable from an append-only ledger.
author: kody-w + Copilot
